description: Tier-2 facts that cannot be derived from the blueprint alone. System must flag these as discovery_gaps.

gaps.rationale: Handle model not on plan; comes from spec book / offer.
Screen colour not specified on plan.
Interior color usually 'paint to match', exact RAL not given.
If absent on elevations, comes from spec sheet.
Hand is sometimes implied by elevation but not codified.
New construction vs replacement / retrofit detail.
Warranty length is offer/contract, not drawing.
